items.example: I usually go shopping on Saturday mornings.
We had a barbecue in the garden last Sunday.
Let's go for a walk in the park.
My family plays board games every Friday night.
We went to the cinema to see the new superhero movie.
Sometimes I just want to stay at home and do nothing.
I relax by listening to music after work.
I love hanging out with my friends at the weekend.
I'm reading a book about ancient history.
We decided to stay in and watch a film.
